query:
SELECT 'moods' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM moods
UNION ALL SELECT 'events', COUNT(*) FROM events
UNION ALL SELECT 'uploads', COUNT(*) FROM uploads
UNION ALL SELECT 'submissions', COUNT(*) FROM submissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'grades', COUNT(*) FROM grades
UNION ALL SELECT 'summaries', COUNT(*) FROM summaries
UNION ALL SELECT 'parentFlags', COUNT(*) FROM parentFlags
UNION ALL SELECT 'struggles', COUNT(*) FROM struggles
UNION ALL SELECT 'gradesByDay', COUNT(*) FROM gradesByDay
UNION ALL SELECT 'bookshelf', COUNT(*) FROM bookshelf;
